name: revit_room_wall_net_area
description: Reports net, opening, and gross wall area per room using SpatialElementGeometryCalculator, grouped by room, wall type, or outer material.

level_id.description: Optional level filter for rooms to analyze

room_ids.description: Optional subset of room element ids to analyze

group_by.description: How to group results; defaults to all three groupings

notes: Read-only; replace TaskDialog summaries with structured JSON return for MCP execution.
